结节病.summary: I型干扰素病显著增加皮肤结节病、硬斑病、扁平苔藓和环状肉芽肿的发病风险。

结节病.title: Diagnostic challenges in isolated cardiac sarcoidosis.

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease and the STING pathway.
ILD.authors: Velu PP, Zhu G, Mackenzie KJ
ILD.summary: STING免疫通路在SAVI和COPA综合征相关的间质性肺病中起关键作用，但其对更常见ILD亚型的意义尚不明确。

ILD.summary: 西澳类风湿关节炎患者间质性肺病发病率稳定，年龄、吸烟和巩膜炎是独立危险因素，且患者死亡率显著升高。

ILD.title: Methodological considerations for quantitative computed tomography-based prognosis in fibrotic interstitial lung disease.
